title: Tiles Mod
description: A deco mod that adds 256 colorful Tile deco Blocks.
body:
This mod adds 256 new deco Blocks.

Every **base** Tile Block can be crafted with 4 Concrete of it's color.

The Tiles second color can be re-dyed with crafting it like Glass, a Dye in the center and 8 Tiles around.

![every Tiles Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8ddb686255e3e0e0894fd1418ef7922e218f9e.png)
